info.title: HomeFinity Backend API
info.description:
API for HomeFinity frontend.

**Required headers for protected endpoints:**
- **Authorization** (mandatory): `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>` — JWT from POST /api/auth/public/signin or POST /api/auth/public/phone/verify-and-login.
- **X-XSRF-TOKEN** (mandatory): CSRF token from GET /api/csrf-token.

**Required header for requests with body (POST/PUT):**
- **Content-Type** (mandatory): `Content-Type: application/json`.

Public endpoints (signin, signup, phone send-code, phone verify-and-login, forgot-password, reset-password, verify-2fa-login, csrf-token, health-check) do not require Authorization or X-XSRF-TOKEN.

get.description: Returns the CSRF token to be sent in subsequent requests. **No Authorization or CSRF header required.** Typically call this first, then send the token in the header (e.g. X-XSRF-TOKEN or header name returned here).
Server health check. **No Authorization or CSRF header required.**

post.description: Authenticate and receive JWT. No Authorization or X-XSRF-TOKEN required. Content-Type: application/json required (request body).
Register a new user. No Authorization or X-XSRF-TOKEN required. Content-Type: application/json required (request body).

400.description: Validation error or username/email/phone already taken

post.description: Send a verification code via SMS to the given phone number. Use this as step 1 before phone login or phone signup. No Authorization or X-XSRF-TOKEN required.

400.description: Phone number is required or invalid

post.summary: Verify OTP and login or sign up (phone)
post.description: Verify the OTP sent to the phone number. If user exists, logs in; otherwise creates a new user (phone signup) and returns JWT. No Authorization or X-XSRF-TOKEN required.

200.description: Login/signup successful; returns JWT and user info

400.description: Phone number is required or invalid

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).
Returns the authenticated user's username. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).
Returns all properties owned by the authenticated user. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).

post.description: Create a new property for the authenticated user. Requires Authorization, X-XSRF-TOKEN, and Content-Type (mandatory).

get.description: Get a single property by ID (must be owned by the authenticated user). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).

404.description: Property not found or not owned by user

put.description: Update an existing property (must be owned by the authenticated user). Requires Authorization, X-XSRF-TOKEN, and Content-Type (mandatory).

404.description: Property not found or not owned by user

delete.description: Delete a property (must be owned by the authenticated user). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).

404.description: Property not found or not owned by user

get.description: Returns all users (admin only). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).
Returns a user by ID (admin only). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).
Returns all roles (admin only). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).

put.description: Update a user's role (admin only). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).
Lock or unlock a user account (admin only). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).
Set account expired or not (admin only). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).
Enable or disable a user account (admin only). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).
Set credentials expired or not (admin only). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).
Set a new password for a user (admin only). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN (mandatory).

get.description: Returns all profiles, optionally filtered by role (admin only). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

get.summary: Get profile by role and ID
get.description: Returns a profile by role and ID (admin only). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

put.description: Approve a profile (admin only). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.
Reject a profile (admin only). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

post.description: Send password reset email. No Authorization or X-XSRF-TOKEN required.
Reset password using token from forgot-password email. No Authorization or X-XSRF-TOKEN required.
Generate 2FA secret and return QR code URL. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.
Disable two-factor authentication. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.
Verify 2FA code to complete 2FA setup. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

get.description: Returns whether 2FA is enabled for the current user. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

post.description: Verify 2FA code during login (after signin returns JWT). No Authorization required.
Update username and password for the current user. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

get.description: Returns available profile roles (OWNER, BROKER, USER). Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.
Returns all profiles with details, optionally filtered by role. Admin only. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.
Returns the current user's profile for the given role. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

put.description: Update the current user's profile. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

post.description: Submit profile for admin approval. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

get.description: Returns the approval status of the current user's profile. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

put.description: Approve a profile by role and ID. Admin only. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.
Reject a profile by role and ID. Admin only. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

get.description: Returns complaints for the current user (filtered by role). Admin: all; Owner/User: raised by, assigned to, or related. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

post.description: Create a new complaint. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

get.description: Get a complaint by ID. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

put.description: Mark a complaint as resolved. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.
Assign a complaint to a user. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.
Update complaint status. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

get.description: Get all messages for a complaint. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

post.description: Add a message to a complaint. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

get.description: Returns all properties, optionally filtered by status. Admin only. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

put.description: Approve a property. Admin only. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.
Reject a property. Admin only. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.
Update property status. Admin only. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

get.description: Returns all audit logs. Admin only. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.
Returns audit logs for a specific property. Admin only. Requires Authorization and X-XSRF-TOKEN.

XsrfTokenHeader.name: X-XSRF-TOKEN

schema.description: CSRF token from GET /api/csrf-token (use the token value from response)

XsrfTokenHeader.description: **Mandatory** for all protected endpoints. Obtain token from GET /api/csrf-token. Authorization is defined via securitySchemes (Bearer JWT). Content-Type is defined by requestBody.content for operations with a body.

bearerAuth.description: JWT token from /api/auth/public/signin. Send as: Authorization: Bearer <token>

csrfHeader.name: X-XSRF-TOKEN
csrfHeader.description: CSRF token from GET /api/csrf-token. Use the header name returned by that endpoint (e.g. X-XSRF-TOKEN) and the token value. Required for state-changing requests and optionally for GETs when cookies are used.

CsrfToken.description: Spring CSRF token; use headerName and token in subsequent requests

email.description: Optional; either email or phoneNumber must be provided

phoneNumber.description: Optional; either email or phoneNumber must be provided. 10-15 digits, may start with +

SignupRequest.description: At least one of email or phoneNumber must be provided.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number to send OTP to (national or E.164 format)
Same phone number used in send-code
